translated: Once upon a time, there was a man who had a very beautiful wife. He loved her so much that he wanted to give her everything she desired. One day, his wife asked him for a special kind of cloth that was only found in a distant land called Zugsɔb. The man, determined to please his wife, set out on a long and arduous journey to Zugsɔb. After many days of travel, he finally arrived at Zugsɔb and found the cloth his wife had requested. He bought it and returned home, eager to give it to her. When he presented the cloth to his wife, she was overjoyed. She thanked her husband for his love and devotion, and they lived happily ever after.
